availability_lag: Monthly archive files are consumed only after the full month is complete and the provider checksum is available.

license.distribution_policy: Fetch exact archives from the provider; do not redistribute raw files without a separate confirmed grant.

point_in_time_limitations: The universe was frozen after the evaluated period and therefore has survivorship and ex-post selection risk.
Exchange listing, delisting, symbol migration, and venue availability are not reconstructed point in time.
Results describe one crypto venue and are not evidence for equities or other asset classes.
Archive corrections remain possible; the committed lock pins the exact provider versions used.

universe.membership_policy: Constant membership across the evaluated period.
